summary: Comment Deletion (soft-delete) and LoadingHoney global loading state features - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests pass. Frontend: All UI elements verified via Playwright. Fixed syntax error in HivePage.js (extra parenthesis at line 845).

backend_api_tests.test_create_and_delete_own_comment: PASS - Author can soft-delete own comment, returns {message: 'Comment deleted'}
backend_api_tests.test_deleted_comment_appears_with_is_del: PASS - Deleted parent with replies shows is_deleted=true, content='[deleted]'
backend_api_tests.test_deleted_comment_without_replies_fil: PASS - Deleted top-level comments without replies are filtered from GET response
backend_api_tests.test_admin_can_delete_any_comment: PASS - Admin can delete any comment
backend_api_tests.test_comments_endpoint_returns_nested_st: PASS - GET /api/posts/{id}/comments returns nested replies array with is_deleted field

component_tests.test_loading_honey_component_exists: PASS - LoadingHoney.js has data-testid='loading-honey', 'Fetching the honey...' text

frontend_ui_tests.login_flow: PASS - Admin login successful, navigated to /hive
frontend_ui_tests.hive_page_load: PASS - 40 posts found, 20 comment buttons visible
frontend_ui_tests.comment_delete_button_visibility: PASS - 2 delete buttons visible (admin can see them)
frontend_ui_tests.delete_confirmation_dialog: PASS - 'Delete Comment?' title, Cancel and Delete buttons found
frontend_ui_tests.soft_deleted_comment_placeholder: PASS - 'This comment has been deleted' text shown with grey avatar
frontend_ui_tests.loading_honey_on_search: PASS - 'Fetching the honey...' text visible during search (honeypot icon pulsing)

bug_fixes_applied.issue: Syntax error - extra parenthesis '))}' should be ')}'
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Changed '))}' to ')}' to fix JSX ternary expression

seed_data_creation: Created test comments with TEST_252_ prefix for testing, automatically cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comment deletion feature fully tested. DELETE /api/comments/{id} soft-deletes (is_deleted=true, content='[deleted]'). GET /api/posts/{id}/comments filters out deleted comments without replies, keeps deleted parents with replies. Frontend shows 'This comment has been deleted' placeholder with grey avatar for soft-deleted comments. LoadingHoney component at /app/frontend/src/components/LoadingHoney.js with data-testid='loading-honey', shows 'Fetching the honey...' text with pulsing honeypot. Used in HivePage, ProfilePage, SearchPage.

comment_deletion.authorization: Only author or admin can delete
comment_deletion.threading_preservation: Deleted comments with replies remain visible as placeholder

loading_honey.usage: Feed initial load, comments loading, profile loading, search loading
